title: Iran sends millions of oil barrels to China through Strait of Hormuz even as war chokes the waterway
summary_full: Iran has continued to ship crude oil via the Strait of Hormuz to China even as the war between U.S.-Israel and Iran has disrupted broader energy supplies via the waterway.
summary_public: Iran has continued to ship crude oil via the Strait of Hormuz to China even as the war between U.S.-Israel and Iran has disrupted broader energy supplies via the waterway.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: war between U.S.-Israel and Iran has disrupted broader energy supplies

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran sends millions of oil barrels to China through Strait of Hormuz
